summary: The Barcelona-Catalunya Grand Prix, also known as the Barcelona Grand Prix, is a scheduled Formula One motor racing event that will take place at the Circuit de Barcelona-Catalunya. It is the first out of two Grands Prix that are scheduled to take place in Spain in 2026, along with the Spanish Grand Prix at the Madring. The Grand Prix will then enter a rotational slot with the Belgian Grand Prix through 2032, where the event will be hosted in even-numbered years.
